name: 爪子刀（★） | 森林 DDPAT
descriptionEn: With its curved blade mimicking a tiger's claw, the karambit was developed as part of the southeast Asian martial discipline of silat. The knife is typically used with a reverse grip, with the finger ring on the index finger. It has been painted using a Digital Disruptive Pattern (DDPAT) hydrographic. By the time you're close enough to notice the pixels it's already too late
descriptionZh: 其弯曲的刀片如同猛虎的利爪一般，爪子刀是作为东南亚马来武术的一部分被研制出来的。这把匕首通常是用食指和无名指反握使用的。 这把武器使用数字迷彩（DDPAT）图案的花纹进行了涂装。 当你能注意到像素图案的时候，已经为时已晚了
